contestName: ICPC 武汉全国邀请赛暨湖北省赛

blocks.text: Iroha and Kaguya play a game starting from a positive integer $n$. A round consists of one operation by each player:

items: Iroha first chooses an integer $x$ with $0 \le x<n$ and sets $n\leftarrow n+x$.
Kaguya then chooses a prime $p$ dividing the current $n$ and sets $n\leftarrow n/p$.

blocks.text: The game ends immediately when $n=1$ at the end of a round. Iroha maximizes the number of rounds while Kaguya minimizes it. Determine the number of rounds under optimal play.
The only line contains $n$ ($1 \le n \le 10^{18}$), the initial integer.
Output a single line containing an integer, representing the total number of rounds the game will last given that both players play optimally.
彩叶和辉夜从一个正整数 $n$ 开始进行博弈。每个回合由双方各进行一次操作：

items: 彩叶先选择一个满足 $0 \le x<n$ 的整数 $x$，令 $n\leftarrow n+x$。
辉夜再选择一个能整除当前 $n$ 的质数 $p$，令 $n\leftarrow n/p$。

blocks.text: 若某个回合结束后 $n=1$，游戏立即结束。彩叶希望最大化总回合数，辉夜希望最小化总回合数。求双方均采取最优策略时游戏进行的回合数。
仅有的一行包含整数 $n$（$1 \le n \le 10^{18}$），表示初始数字。
输出一行包含一个整数，表示在双方都采取最优策略的情况下，游戏最终进行的总回合数。
